comments.body: Cockpit tests failed for commit 74a100f542b85373bbba9e9466d86443873c0f4d. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.

The cockpit failure is a [firefox regression](https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1947402). We reverted our CI to the previous Firefox version, so it won't happen any more on the next push (as your tests are red as well, I suppose this will still get one). Sorry for the noise!
